doc.notes: Login form, JWT token management, auto-refresh.
Batch delete via checkbox selection. No batch edit.
Schema defined. Editable via assoc editor. Context-driven field selection not yet implemented.
Class editor with props array, AG-Grid list, modal CRUD.
Props rendered via getSortedProps with inheritance display.
Actions execute via direct API calls, not ActionExecutor.
Arrays rendered as geArray, not via AtomCollection.
Test update via es-cli
Prop helpers used throughout: getPropLabel, getPropType, getCls.
Direct API calls, not AtomStorage. Auth token management manual.
Uses raw class metadata cache, not full ElementStore instance.
Uses getClassMeta cache, not classRegistry or genesisConverter.
Direct REST calls, no ProxyStorage.
All 8 types rendered: geInput/geRelation/geObject/geFreeObject.
geGrid() inline AG-Grid for typed arrays. ~100 lines. Reuses buildGridColumns + renderModalForClass with save-back callback.
Editor picker filtering by data_type partially implemented.
Search across classes in header search.
Genesis reload button triggers server reload.
Health indicator in header.
generic-editor.js: getArrayMode/isCollection. fields.js: geAssocArray editor. grid.js updated.
Full CRUD: AG-Grid list + modal editor with geField rendering.
Schema defined. Editable via assoc editor. Context-aware grid rendering not yet implemented.
Provider objects editable. No live provider testing UI.
Billing actions: charge, create_invoice, etc.
Auth tokens passed through to billing API.
12 billing classes defined in billing.genesis.json.
Props defined per billing class with proper types.
Custom actions (charge, create_invoice, etc.) dispatched via CRUD provider WebService commands. Equivalent to executeApi subset — no FunctionRegistry/EventBus/composite.
String, integer, float, boolean, datetime used across billing classes.
billing.genesis.json loaded by ES server.
No assoc arrays in billing genesis. Works via PHP backend support.
CRUD via crud_provider pattern.
12 CRUD providers mapping to WebService API.
Billing is a CRUD provider target, not a proxy client. Not applicable.
All CRUD providers have paginator.type=none
MySQL multi-tenant backend via sel_company (omc/gns/tyco)
AtomStorage manages JWT tokens. Auto-refresh support.
ElementStore.seed() bulk loads. ElementStoreClient batch support.
ClassContext interface. contexts on Element interface.
ElementStoreClient wraps REST. ElementStore.getClass() from local store. AtomClass extends AtomObj.
ElementStore.collectClassProps() walks extends_id chain. findPropDef() resolves by key.
ActionExecutor routes by type.
AtomCollection: Proxy-wrapped array with bidirectional binding.
AtomObj: Proxy-based reactive object with change tracking.
AtomProp: type-aware GET/SET with coercion.
AtomStorage: storage routing, auth, cascade save.
ElementStore: central object registry, seed, collect, find.
classRegistry, genesisConverter, ElementStoreClient.
ProxyStorage for standalone CRUD to remote ES.
8 canonical types in DataType union. AtomProp type coercion.
FilterBy interface used by editor pickers.
ElementStore.find() searches local store across all classes.
genesisConverter.ts flattenGenesis(). ElementStore.seed() loads flattened data.
ElementStoreClient.health() calls GET /health.
types.ts: ArrayMode, normalizeArrayMode. AtomProp: getArrayMode/isCollection/isIndexedArray/isAssocArray. getPropValue/setPropValue handle assoc maps.
AtomObj with Proxy-based property access. ElementStore.setObject() indexes + saves.
PropContext interface. contexts on Prop interface.
AtomStorage routes to providers. ProxyStorage for remote.
ActionExecutor.php handles api/cli/function/event/composite types.
JWT verification via agura-auth. AuthMiddleware checks tokens.
POST /store/{class} accepts arrays for batch upsert.
@class_context class in system.genesis. contexts prop on @class as assoc map.
ClassModel.php handles full class CRUD via /class endpoints.
ClassMeta.php resolves inheritance chain. collectClassProps walks extends_id.
Full PHP ActionExecutor: execute, executeApi (cURL), executeFunction, executeEvent, executeComposite, buildUrl, applyReverseMapping, updateLinks. All 6 action types supported.
No reactive collection class in PHP context. PHP returns arrays directly from storage.

PHP AtomObj/EntityObj covers core: constructor, data, validate, toJSON, hasChanges, getProps. No Proxy reactivity, no subscribe/extendsFrom client patterns. delete() = deleteObject(). No _related or cascade save on client side.
PHP Prop class: getPropValue, setPropValue, all type helpers. isRelation/isEmbeddedObject/isOwnershipRelation/isReferenceRelation all present.
Server-side storage provider interface + 3 backends. No client-pattern: local/seed/composite not applicable server-side. Auth management handled at API layer.
ClassModel covers the server-side equivalent: class registry, object CRUD, storage routing, _resolveStorage. Not a client store pattern. No in-memory object graph, no subscribe, no _version.
GenesisLoader✅ BroadcastService (WebSocket)✅ IStorageProvider interface✅. No ClassRegistry/FunctionRegistry as explicit client modules (PHP resolves via DI).
8 canonical types. Prop.php type helpers. ClassModel casting/validation.
EventBus.php with before/after hooks on CRUD operations.
GET /export dumps all data. Seed write-back via GenesisLoader.
Stored as JSON in options.filter_by — server persists it, client-side filtering is caller responsibility
GET /store/_find/{id} searches all classes.
GenesisLoader.php loads system.genesis.json + seed files. Supports write-back.
GET /health returns status, version, storage connectivity.
Prop.php: getArrayMode/isCollection/isIndexedArray/isAssocArray. ClassModel: validateType and castValue handle assoc.
index.php routes /store/{class}/{id}. ClassModel validates, coerces, stores.
@prop_context class in system.genesis. contexts prop on @prop as assoc map.
CRUD providers map ES operations to external APIs.
PHP is the storage origin — it does not proxy to another ES. Not applicable.
GET /query/{class} accepts filter params as query string, plus page, pageSize, sortBy, sortOrder. CouchDB Mango queries built from filters. Returns array with X-Total-Count header for pagination.
Relation prop get/set works. POST/PUT /store/{class} accepts IDs only — no cascade for nested objects yet. Cascade pre-pass pending in ClassModel::setObject().
3 backends: JSON file, MongoDB, CouchDB. Configuration only, no dedicated endpoints.
Login/logout testing.
Tests class prop resolution.
Type coercion tests for all 8 types.
onChange callbacks with property change monitoring
Cross-class find testing.
Tests genesis reload.
Needs testing.
Full CRUD testing UI.
store.find({class_id:...}) filter only, no pagination/limit
addChild()/removeChild() wire relations in memory. setPropValue() accepts AtomObj. setObject(raw) does NOT auto-resolve relation IDs — lazy resolution only.
Uses default REST storage, no custom backend config
